recommendations.title: Stargate: Continuum
recommendations.overview: Ba'al travels back in time and prevents the Stargate program from being started. SG-1 must somehow restore history.

recommendations.title: Real Murders: An Aurora Teagarden Mystery
recommendations.overview: Aurora finds a member of her crime buff group, the Real Murders Club, killed in a manner that eerily resembles the crime the club was about to discuss. As other brutal "copycat" killings follow, Aurora will have to uncover the person behind the terri

recommendations.title: A Bone to Pick: An Aurora Teagarden Mystery
recommendations.overview: A librarian with a sharp mind for murder, Aurora Teagarden is known around her small town as a master  sleuth. When her friend Jane unexpectedly dies and leaves Aurora everything in her will, she also leaves a  troubling murder mystery haunting her n

recommendations.title: Boys
recommendations.overview: Two teen track stars discover first love as they train for the biggest relay race of their young lives.

recommendations.title: Rocko's Modern Life: Static Cling
recommendations.overview: After 20 years in space, Rocko returns to a technologically advanced O-Town and makes it his mission to get his favorite show back on the air.

recommendations.title: Revenge of the Bridesmaids
recommendations.overview: Two women plot revenge against the woman marrying their friend's ex-boyfriend.

recommendations.title: The Spirit of Christmas
recommendations.overview: A woman falls in love with a man who is somewhat unavailable.

recommendations.title: L'Atalante
recommendations.overview: Newly married couple Juliette and ship captain Jean struggle through marriage as they travel on the L'Atalante along with the captain's first mate and a cabin boy.

recommendations.title: Wizards of Waverly Place: Wizard School
recommendations.overview: When Alex is caught using magic to clean her room she is forced to go to wizard school with Justin. Max and Jerry camp out on the terrace to prove their manhood.

recommendations.title: The Christmas Secret
recommendations.overview: While her life is falling apart, single mother Christine finds a magical family heirloom that leads to love and good fortune during Christmas.
